news.headline: Trump plans to include SOL, XRP, and ADA in crypto reserve. Shift in rhetoric post Bitcoin 2024 speech.
news.summary: The President's stance on establishing a Bitcoin strategic reserve has undergone a significant change following his speech at the Bitcoin 2024 event.

news.headline: AI agents becoming autonomous might create a new economic paradigm, separate from human control.
news.summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) agents are exhibiting autonomous behavior, indicating a potential shift towards a new economic paradigm where the technology surpasses its role as a mere tool. This development signifies a significant change in the landscape with AI agents gaining independence and functioning beyond traditional expectations. This could potentially lead to a transformation in various sectors, as AI agents increasingly operate on their own accord. The implications of this shift are noteworthy, as it could redefine the way AI is integrated into industries and societies worldwide. This trend highlights the evolving nature of AI and its potential to shape future economic systems.

news.headline: Best Contracting Services honors Alona Alimagno Bowman for Women in Construction Week, showcasing women's significant role in the industry.
news.summary: GARDENA, Calif.-- Best Contracting Services is honoring Women in Construction Week (March 2-8, 2025) by celebrating the accomplishments of Alona Alimagno Bowman, Vice President of Operations. She plays a crucial role in the company’s management team and is instrumental in driving field operations. This recognition aligns with the National Association of Women in Construction (NAWIC)'s mission to showcase the importance of women in the construction industry and enhance opportunities for them.

news.headline: ‘Anora’ and ‘Conclave’ vie for top prize in fiercely contested Oscars race.
Trump announces US crypto reserve with XRP, Solana, and Cardano, but no mention of Bitcoin.
news.summary: On Sunday, President Trump announced plans for the U.S. to establish a strategic cryptocurrency reserve, comprising Cardano, Solana, and XRP. The absence of Bitcoin from this reserve has raised questions.

CoreWeave hires Jim Higgins, ex-CISO of Snap Inc. and Block, Inc., as its new CISO to strengthen cybersecurity.
news.summary: CoreWeave, a leading technology company, has announced the appointment of Jim Higgins as the new Chief Information Security Officer. Higgins, a former CISO at Snap Inc. and Block, Inc., will focus on strengthening the company's cybersecurity strategy. With this new leadership addition, CoreWeave aims to bolster its security measures and protect its valuable assets from cyber threats. This move highlights the company's commitment to enhancing its security protocols.

news.headline: Supernormal sees conversion rates double with AssemblyAI, thanks to enhanced transcription and multilingual support.

This success can be attributed to enhancements in transcription precision and the addition of multilingual capabilities. This development showcases the effectiveness of the partnership in improving user experience and driving business growth.

news.headline: BNB Chain to host Incubation Alliance event at ETH Denver 2025, promoting collaboration in blockchain with panel talks, startup pitches, and networking.

The event will feature engaging panel conversations, startup presentations, and chances for networking. The initiative seeks to bring together key players in the industry to drive innovation.

news.headline: Blockchain resilience against adversarial control analyzed, exploring safety & liveness limits in client & network models. (Read More)
news.summary: A detailed examination was conducted to assess the resistance of blockchain technology to adversarial control, investigating the boundaries of security and functionality in different client and network frameworks. This analysis delved into the capability of blockchain to withstand adversarial influence and maintain operational continuity, revealing key insights into its robustness. The study's findings shed light on the critical importance of blockchain resilience, highlighting its ability to ensure system integrity and prevent disruptions. In-depth scrutiny of blockchain's performance across diverse models showcased its effectiveness in upholding security and stability. This research serves as a valuable resource for understanding the strengths and limitations of blockchain technology in combatting adversarial threats.

news.headline: New Web3 social casino game by NHN, Pebble City, launches on Sui, integrating blockchain with community interactions.

This game introduces a unique gaming experience by combining Web3 technology, blockchain integration, and interactive features driven by the community. Players can now immerse themselves in this innovative gameplay experience.

news.headline: New release LangGraph 0.3 features prebuilt AI agents in Python and JavaScript to assist developers, backed by tech giants. Simplifies AI creation, promotes community input.

news.headline: Global Heat Pump Market set to reach $157.8 billion by 2029, growing at a CAGR of 11.8% as per MarketsandMarkets™ report.
news.summary: The global Heat Pump Market is set to grow from USD 90.1 billion in 2024 to USD 157.8 billion by 2029, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 11.8%. This growth is attributed to the versatile nature of heat pumps facilitating a transition to a cleaner world and a stronger global economy. The adoption of heat pumps is increasing due to the global expansion of heating and cooling solutions, with integration of renewable energy sources like solar and wind power further driving demand. Stringent regulations aiming at reducing greenhouse gas emissions and promoting energy efficiency are also key factors propelling the market expansion. Government support and safety regulations play pivotal roles in driving growth. Heat pumps offer more sustainable and eco-friendly heating and cooling solutions compared to traditional systems. Overall, the market has seen significant expansion recently in line with global efforts to reduce reliance on fossil fuels and carbon footprints.

news.headline: Norway's 1st AI factory by Telenor prioritizes sustainability and data sovereignty, promoting green computing. #Tech #Innovation

The initiative is set to advance green computing and data sovereignty in the region. This move highlights the increasing importance of environmentally friendly practices and ensuring control over data.

news.headline: Panama seeks solutions for shuttered Cobre Panama mine after accounting for 5% of GDP and 1.5% of global copper production.
news.summary: Panama is on the verge of reaching a solution regarding its largest mining asset. President José Raúl Mulino has mentioned that his government is exploring innovative approaches to settle the dispute with First Quantum Minerals concerning the Cobre Panama copper mine. This resolution is pending the finalization of social security reforms.Mulino stated to reporters that discussions are happening within government institutions on how to address the mine, emphasizing the complexity of the matter. He assured that once the social security issues are resolved, attention will be focused on the mine.The Cobre Panama mine, which contributed to 5% of Panama's GDP and 1.5% of global copper production, was suddenly closed in late 2023. In October 2023, former President Laurentino Cortizo confirmed...For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: NVIDIA's KvikIO boosts data processing with remote IO, improving performance for cloud workloads using S3 and Azure Blob Storage.
news.summary: The advanced KvikIO technology developed by NVIDIA enhances remote IO performance significantly, aiming to streamline data processing for cloud operations. It particularly targets object storage services such as S3 and Azure Blob Storage to improve efficiency.

news.headline: Duolingo Q4: Revenue up 39% to $209.6M, Total bookings up 42% to $271.6M, Paid subscribers at 9.5M increased by 43%.
news.summary: Duolingo, Inc. (NASDAQ:DUOL) saw a decrease in premarket trading following its mixed fourth-quarter results announcement. The company's revenue rose by 39% year over year to $209.6 million, surpassing the expected $205.4 million, primarily driven by a 48% increase in subscription revenue. Total bookings also jumped by 42% to $271.6 million, with Subscription bookings climbing by 50% to $236.5 million during the quarter. Paid subscribers reached 9.5 million by the quarter's end, marking a 43% increase from the previous year. The growth in subscription bookings and revenue was supported by a higher average number of subscribers.

news.headline: Gearbox & Gear Motors market valued at $15.3 billion in 2023, projected to reach $23.4 billion by 2034, driven by industrial and automotive demand. Major players include Siemens AG, SEW-Eurodrive, Bonfiglioli, Nord Drivesystems, ABB Group, Sumitomo Heavy Industries, among others. Market driven by industrial automation, advancements in power transmission technology, and demand from sectors like automotive, wind energy, and manufacturing. Start-ups disrupting with innovative technologies. Key growth drivers: industrial automation, renewable energy growth, infrastructure development, automotive industry expansion, and demand for energy-efficient solutions. Market developments include technological advancements, sustainability initiatives, mergers & acquisitions, expansion in emerging markets, and integration with IoT & AI.
news.summary: The global Gearbox & Gear Motors industry was valued at US$ 15.3 billion in 2023 and is estimated to grow at a CAGR of 4.0% from 2024 to 2034. Factors such as industrial automation, advancements in power transmission technology, and increasing demand from sectors like automotive, wind energy, and manufacturing are expected to drive the market, reaching US$ 23.4 billion by 2034. Key players in the market include Siemens AG, SEW-Eurodrive, Bonfiglioli, Nord Drivesystems, and ABB Group, who are focusing on innovation and strategic partnerships to enhance market positions. Start-ups like NanoGearTech, RevoDrive, and EcoGear Solutions are introducing innovative technologies in gearbox solutions. Market drivers include industrial automation, renewable energy growth, infrastructure development, automotive industry expansion, and the demand for energy-efficient solutions. Companies in the market are focusing on technological advancements, sustainability initiatives, mergers & acquisitions, and expanding into emerging markets to stay competitive.

news.headline: Enhance Python dependency management with uv and Ray for efficient execution in clusters, facilitating setup and consistency.
news.summary: The incorporation of ultraviolet (UV) and Ray technologies improves Python dependency management in distributed systems. This integration streamlines environment setups and ensures consistent execution within clusters. These technologies significantly enhance efficiency, promoting seamless operations across the system. For further details, click on the link provided.

news.headline: Eli Lilly doubles capital spending in US drug manufacturing to $50 billion, plans to build 4 new manufacturing sites.
news.summary: A press conference held in Washington, D.C. revealed Eli Lilly And Co's plans to enhance its domestic medicine production with the construction of four new pharmaceutical manufacturing sites in the United States. The company is currently in talks with various states. Previously, Eli Lilly had committed $23 billion for domestic capital expansion from 2020 to 2024. With the latest announcement, the company's total U.S. capital expansion commitments have now exceeded $50 billion since 2020. For further details, refer to the complete story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Robert Reich criticizes Trump administration and $880 billion Medicaid cuts, calling it "tyranny."
news.summary: Renowned former U.S. Secretary of Labor, Robert Reich, recently expressed apprehensions regarding the governance tactics and policy judgments of the Trump administration. He highlighted a noticeable disparity between the existing state of matters and his own personal encounters within the cabinet. In a recent interview with MSNBC, Reich criticized Trump's initial cabinet gathering, labeling it as a mere "theatrical show for the media" and emphasized the absence of substantive work being accomplished. Moreover, he underscored the inconsistency between President Trump's vow to preserve Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid intact and the latest budget resolution, which entails a directive for the Energy and Commerce Committee to considerably reduce Medicaid by an unparalleled $880 billion.

news.headline: Ethereum devs resolve Holesky testnet problems in Call #206, discussing recovery plans and Sepolia upgrade.
news.summary: Developers of Ethereum tackle challenges with the Holesky testnet during Core Developers Execution Call #206. The discussion primarily revolves around implementing recovery strategies and preparing for the forthcoming Sepolia upgrade. The meeting was crucial in addressing these issues and ensuring the smooth functioning of the testnet and the upcoming upgrade. For more details, refer to the official sources documenting the call.

news.headline: MPLX buys remaining 55% of BANGL pipeline for $715M. Deal expected to bring mid-teen returns.
news.summary: MPLX LP (NYSE:MPLX) has recently announced an agreement to acquire the remaining 55% stake in BANGL, LLC from WhiteWater and Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ:FANG) for $715 million. As part of the deal, MPLX may also make additional earnout payments if specific financial targets are achieved, capped at a certain amount. The partnership anticipates immediate benefits from this transaction, with expected mid-teen returns. The agreement is pending certain conditions before finalization. Further details can be found on financial news platforms.

news.headline: SHELLUSDT perpetual swap now available on BitMEX, offers 50x leverage for trading long and short positions.

This latest addition to their platform supports both long and short positions, catering to a wide range of trading strategies. With this offering, BitMEX aims to enhance options for traders seeking increased leverage and flexibility in their trading activities.

news.headline: Owens & Minor reports Q4 earnings: $0.45 EPS, $2.70B sales, $695.02M Patient Direct revenue, $2B Products & Services revenue, plans $100M share repurchase.
news.summary: Owens & Minor Inc. (NYSE:OMI) disclosed an adjusted EPS of $0.45 for the fourth quarter of 2024, a decline from $0.69 the previous year but surpassing the consensus estimate of $0.52. The company's reported sales stood at $2.70 billion, marking a 1.5% increase from the previous year and surpassing the expected $2.69 billion. Patient Direct revenue climbed to $695.02 million, up by 4.6% year-over-year. Products & Healthcare Services revenue saw a slight 0.5% increase, reaching $2 billion. The adjusted operating income for the fourth quarter was reported at $95.4 million, down from $110.8 million. Adjusted EBITDA also experienced a decrease from $169.6 million. For further details, the full story can be accessed through Benzinga.com. Owens & Minor Stock faced a decline following mixed Q4 preliminary results and a $310 million Apria Goodwill Charge.

news.headline: US stock futures are up after sell-off. Nvidia down 8%, Nasdaq by 2.78%. Trump escalates tariffs. Fed unlikely to cut rates in March meeting.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures rebounded on Friday after a previous sell-off. Futures for all major indices rose except for the Russell 2000. Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) fell over 8% due to lower gross margins from Blackwell chip production. President Trump escalated tariff threats against Mexico, Canada, and China. The 10-year Treasury yield was at 4.25%, with a 94.5% chance the Fed will keep rates unchanged in March. S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE:SPY) and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF (NASDAQ:QQQ) both increased in premarket trading. Nasdaq Composite dropped 2.78%, with tech and communication sectors declining while financial and energy sectors gained. Dell Technologies Inc. (NYSE:DELL) missed revenue estimates, while SoundHound AI Inc. (NASDAQ:SOUN) beat expectations. Initial jobless claims rose to 242,000, above expectations.

news.headline: Global Methanol-to-Olefins market valued at $24.5 billion in 2023, set to grow at 5.5% CAGR, reaching $44.1 billion by 2034. China is leading in MTO adoption, focusing on sustainability. Top players include CNPC, SABIC, ExxonMobil, Shell Global Solutions, and LyondellBasell Industries.
news.summary: The global Methanol-to-Olefins market was valued at $24.5 Billion in 2023 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 5.5% from 2024 to 2034, reaching $44.1 Billion by 2034. The market is driven by the increasing demand for ethylene and propylene in various industries, with a shift towards methanol-based olefin production for sustainability and cost-efficiency. China leads in MTO adoption, utilizing coal-to-methanol production to enhance petrochemical self-sufficiency. The process bridges traditional petrochemical and sustainable industries by utilizing resources like natural gas, coal, and biomass. Major players in the market include China National Petroleum Corporation, SABIC, ExxonMobil, Shell Global Solutions, and LyondellBasell Industries. This shift towards sustainable production techniques is driven by reducing carbon footprints and converting waste into valuable chemical building blocks.

news.headline: Hong Kong's Jan 2025 Monetary Stats: Total deposits and renminbi deposits up, indicating positive economic trends.
news.summary: According to recent data from the Hong Kong Monetary Authority, there has been a notable rise in total deposits in January 2025. This increase is particularly evident in renminbi deposits, showcasing positive economic momentum. The surge in total deposits suggests a growing confidence in the financial sector, with the exact figures reflecting the improving economic landscape. This development aligns with the overall positive outlook for the economy, as indicated by the rising numbers in both total deposits and specifically in renminbi deposits.

news.summary: In January 2025, there was a 3.3% rise in mortgage applications reported by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. However, approved loans saw a 2.1% decline amounting to HK$25 billion.

news.headline: Hims stock drops after commercial release as semaglutide business faces setback in weight-loss drugs battle.
news.summary: A recent commercial released by Hims & Hers Health has created quite an impact. However, the stock of Hims is currently facing a decline following a setback in its semaglutide business. The company's stock is experiencing a roller-coaster ride as the competition in weight-loss drugs intensifies, leaving investors apprehensive about the future. This turn of events comes as a surprise given the initial buzz surrounding the commercial.

news.headline: Senator Elizabeth Warren facing internal dissent on crypto policy within Senate Banking Committee.
news.summary: A potential division is emerging within the Senate Banking Committee as Sen. Elizabeth Warren finds herself at odds with certain members over cryptocurrency policy. This disagreement on Capitol Hill could lead to a rift as discussions intensify. The clash revolves around differing views on how to regulate cryptocurrencies, a contentious issue that has gained prominence as the market continues to grow rapidly. Sen. Warren's stance may put her in opposition to some members of the committee, highlighting the complexity of reaching a consensus on this matter. As discussions unfold, the divide could deepen, potentially affecting the direction of cryptocurrency regulations in the near future.

news.headline: Global commercial vehicle telematics market to reach US$108.5 billion by 2034, growing at 16.2% CAGR from 2024. Regulatory compliance, innovation driving growth. Top players include Geotab, Trimble Inc., Verizon Connect, Omnitracs, MiX Telematics, among others.
news.summary: The global commercial vehicle telematics market was valued at around US$20.4 billion in 2023 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 16.2% from 2024 to 2034, reaching an estimated value of US$108.5 billion by 2034. This growth is driven by factors such as the need for fuel efficiency, regulatory compliance, and enhanced fleet productivity. Regulatory mandates like the Electronic Logging Device requirement in the US and digital tachograph regulations in Europe are also boosting telematics adoption. The market is rapidly expanding due to factors like stringent fleet regulations, cost optimization pressures, 5G and IoT integration, the rise of electric and autonomous fleets, and increased focus on security and theft prevention. Leading companies in the market include Geotab, Trimble Inc., Verizon Connect, Omnitracs, and MiX Telematics. In addition, disruptive startups like Motive and Samsara are also gaining traction in the industry.

news.headline: Federal Reserve's key inflation metric, headline PCE grew by 2.5% in Jan 2025, down from 2.6% in Dec, marking a slowdown.
news.summary: Updated information reveals that the Federal Reserve's main inflation gauge met expectations on Friday, showing the first slowdown in four months. The Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) price index rose by 2.5% year-over-year in January 2025, down from 2.6% in December. This figure aligns with economists' predictions. Excluding food and energy, core PCE increased by 2.6% compared to the same period last year. In addition, the Q4 Gross Domestic Product (GDP) remains at 2.3% following a minor adjustment in the second estimate. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Tesla, Palantir, MicroStrategy are top losers last week. SMCI, APP, CART, NTAP, PSTG stocks dropped significantly.

Share prices of various companies experienced significant declines, such as Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI) seeing a 26.06% decrease due to continued volatility after its quarterly report filing. Similarly, AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ: APP) shares dropped by 21.57% following negative assessments from short reports. Maplebear Inc.'s stock (NASDAQ: CART) also took a hit, dipping by 21.53% after reporting lower fourth-quarter revenue than expected, prompting analysts to revise price forecasts. Another notable decline was seen in NetApp, Inc. (NASDAQ: NTAP), with a 19.81% decrease attributed to worse-than-expected third-quarter sales and lower guidance for fourth-quarter and FY25 adjusted EPS. Investors are advised to stay informed about these developments, as seen in the detailed report available on Benzinga.com.

Additionally, the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) determined that meme coins are considered collectibles rather than securities. This news resulted in Bitcoin dropping below $80,000.

news.summary: In Montreal on February 28, 2025, Boralex Inc. (TSX: BLX) announced its financial results for the quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. The Corporation expressed satisfaction with its performance during this period.
